scripts.reload: pnpm --filter tabwright build && pnpm --filter mcp-extension reload
scripts.agents.md: agentsdotmd ./tabwright-agents.md core.md typescript.md pnpm.md vitest.md changelog.md docs-writing.md github.md playwright.md zod.md gitchamber.md
scripts.release: pnpm release:check-cli-version && pnpm --filter tabwright build && cd extension && PRODUCTION=true TABWRIGHT_EXTENSION_DIST=dist-release pnpm build && cd dist-release && zip -r ../../tabwright-$(node -p "require('../manifest.json').version").zip . && cd ../.. && realpath tabwright-*.zip | pbcopy && open 'https://chrome.google.com/webstore/devconsole/a379d569-9533-44e4-9749-0368f6dbf878/jfeammnjpkecdekppnclgkkffahnhfhe/edit/package'
scripts.bootstrap: git submodule update --init && pnpm install && node playwright/utils/generate_injected.js && node playwright/packages/playwright-core/build.mjs
